rationale: Section 49.002 enumerates options for districts exceeding entitlement to reduce revenue. Increasing the homestead exemption indirectly lowers local tax revenue but does not alter or conflict with these enumerated options; no amendment to this section is required.
quote: A district with a local revenue level in excess of entitlement may take any combination of the following actions to reduce the district's revenue level:
_note: Indirect fiscal interaction exists—higher homestead exemption reduces local taxable value, potentially shifting district revenue levels relative to entitlement—but no direct conflict with operative text of Sec. 49.002.
